summary: Iteration 73: Barcode System - All 12 backend tests PASSED, all frontend features verified. Complete barcode system implementation working correctly.

FEATURE_1_PRODUCTS_BARCODE_COLUMN.description: Products page shows barcode column with AG-prefixed codes
tests: test_01: GET /api/products returns products with barcode field
test_02: Search products by barcode works correctly
UI: Barcode column visible in products table with codes like AG43497580

FEATURE_2_GENERATE_BARCODES_BUTTON.description: Products page Generate Barcodes button calls bulk API
tests: test_09: POST /api/products/generate-barcodes-bulk API works (returns 0 as all have barcodes)
UI: Generate Barcodes button found with data-testid='bulk-barcode-btn'

FEATURE_3_PRINT_BARCODES_NAV.description: Products page and sidebar have Print Barcodes navigation
tests: UI: Print Barcodes button found in Products page header
UI: Print Barcodes link found in sidebar under Inventory & Purchasing

FEATURE_4_PRODUCT_DETAIL_BARCODE.description: Product Detail page shows barcode section with SVG and buttons
tests: test_08: POST /api/products/{id}/generate-barcode returns existing barcode
UI: Product Barcode section visible with SVG barcode rendering
UI: Print Label button visible for products with barcode
UI: Generate Barcode button would show for products without barcode

FEATURE_5_BARCODE_PRINT_PAGE.description: Barcode Print page with label sizes, add all, quantity controls
tests: UI: Barcode Print page loads at /barcode-print
UI: Label size selector with 40x30mm (Default) and 50x30mm options
UI: Add All Products button adds 67 products to print list
UI: Quantity controls (+/-) work for each product
UI: Product search input available
UI: SVG barcode previews displayed for each product

FEATURE_6_BARCODE_LOOKUP.description: Barcode lookup API for sales scanning
tests: test_03: GET /api/products/barcode-lookup/{barcode} returns product with stock
test_04: GET /api/products/barcode-lookup/{invalid} returns 404
test_10: Barcode lookup with branch_id applies branch-specific pricing
test_05: POST /api/products/barcode-check detects existing barcode
test_06: POST /api/products/barcode-check returns duplicate:false for new barcode
test_07: POST /api/products/barcode-check with exclude_product_id excludes self

FEATURE_8_BARCODE_FORMAT.description: Barcodes follow AG prefix + 8 digit format (Code128)
tests: test_11: Repacks verified to have no barcodes
test_12: All barcodes follow AG + 8 digit format (e.g., AG43497580)

FEATURE_9_SALES_SCANNER.description: Sales page scanner listener for barcode input
tests: Code review: UnifiedSalesPage has barcode scanner listener (lines 127-190)
Implementation: Captures rapid keystrokes within 100ms followed by Enter
Implementation: Calls handleBarcodeScan which looks up product via API

critical_code_review_comments: Barcode generation uses AG prefix + 8 random digits with uniqueness check (100 retries max)
Bulk barcode generation only targets parent products (is_repack != true), repacks excluded
Barcode lookup API enriches response with branch-specific pricing and available stock
BarcodeDisplay component uses JsBarcode library with CODE128 format
BarcodePrintPage correctly opens popup window with printable labels
Scanner listener uses 100ms timeout to detect rapid keystrokes (USB scanner pattern)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products with auto-generated barcodes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 73 verified complete barcode system: (1) Backend APIs for barcode generation, lookup, bulk generation, and duplicate checking all working, (2) Frontend ProductsPage has barcode column and header buttons, (3) ProductDetailPage shows barcode SVG with Print Label button, (4) BarcodePrintPage at /barcode-print has label size selector (40x30mm, 50x30mm), Add All Products button, quantity controls, and print popup functionality, (5) Sidebar has Print Barcodes link under Inventory & Purchasing, (6) Sales page has barcode scanner listener for USB scanner input. All 67 parent products have AG-prefixed barcodes, repacks do not have barcodes.
